about_item: 【Fashion Pet Purse Carrier】This pet tote bag is designed for small dogs, cats and other small pets. Provide maximum convenience and comfort for daily use, shopping, traveling.
【Perfect Soft Side Carrier for Small Dogs】This dog purse measures : 16 "x7 "x11.5" (LxWxH), suitable for pets up to 10 lbs.

【High Quality Durable Leather】Our dog carrier purse is made of durable, high quality vegan leather. Soft, lightweight, no color fading, no deformation, can withstand daily wear and tear. Easy to meet shopping, walking, traveling, outdoor activities and other trips.
【Airline Approved】Three-side breathable mesh ensures small dogs and cats have enough breathability and comfort to meet most airline requirements.

【Satisfaction Service】We want you to be happy with your pet carrier, but if you are not satisfied with your purchase or if you have any questions about your order, please let us know and we will be happy to help you with your questions, we will get back to you within 24 hours.

summary.text: Customers find this dog carrier to be a great everyday option that looks more like a purse than a traditional carrier, with a perfect fit for Dachshunds and plenty of pockets for regular purse items. The carrier is sturdy and holds up well over time.

authors_reviews.title: BEST everyday dog carrier - highly recommend
authors_reviews.text: This was my favorite dog carrier! Unfortunately, my puppy has officially outgrown it and I now have to use a far less attractive bag, but it was the best. She outgrew it when she was about 11 lbs, but she is long, so a more "normal" shaped dog may be able to use it at a slightly higher weight. Though it can be tough on the shoulder.I loved the mesh openings at the top and the side. My dog always felt very secure inside - the bottom is very flat and sturdy. I usually put a baby blanket at the bottom so she was cozy and to help keep the bag clean. I got so many compliments on this carrier when we went out because it looks like a nice purse. The outside pockets were also great - one with a zipper where I put my wallet and key and one without a zipper where I kept my phone. I would highly recommend this!
authors_reviews.author: A MCM

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable and nice for my dog and me
authors_reviews.text: This bag is great! It doesn't just look good, it is very comfortable for me and my 5.5 lbs toy poodle. I use a pillow inside it because it is not very soft, but she loves sleeping in this bag!
authors_reviews.author: Daniela H.

authors_reviews.title: Great for my Yorkie
authors_reviews.text: This fits my 8 pound Yorkie perfectly, and I can easily bring him anywhere we go. His other bag allows him to poke his head out and bark at people or growl if they get to an ear, but this one can be completely enclosed. It’s also TSA approved although we haven’t flown together yet. It also has plenty of pockets to keep regular purse items like phone, make up, etc..
authors_reviews.author: Bean

authors_reviews.title: Love that it can be carried like a tote, but best for animals 5-6 pounds or less
authors_reviews.text: I had high hopes for this as I love that it looks more like a purse than a carrier, you can carry it like a tote, there's plenty of ventilation and views while the closed sides probably feel protective to a lot of animals. The quality is fine - the materials are clearly not leather, though they are supposed to look like leather I think, but it seems sturdy and well-made.I bought it for my 8 pound cat to go to the vet. Unfortunately, the top is pretty narrow and it was really hard to get her in, and once I did, it was clearly too small to be able to close the top without squashing her in. Probably a 5-6 pound animal is the maximum size for this bag - and for those animals I think it would be an excellent carrier.
authors_reviews.author: Lush Landscapes

authors_reviews.title: Get a lot of compliments :)
authors_reviews.text: I use it a lot because it’s more discreet than a travel bag and so I think it’s cute!
authors_reviews.author: JS

authors_reviews.title: Stylish dog bag
authors_reviews.text: Nice quality, good looking dog bag. My dog has used a bag since she was a puppy to travel with me every where I go, but I have always hated the way her bag looked. This is just what I have always wanted. Not only Nice looking, but quality is beyond what most bags provide and she is very proud of it.
authors_reviews.author: Terri J.

authors_reviews.title: Spectacular design!
authors_reviews.text: W O W ! 10 stars! This is THE small pet carrier. Plenty of easy access pockets, quick zipper functions, comfy inside, perfect size for a small pet…Khaleesi is 6 pounds, 10-11 inches tall and 13-14 inches long. There is no stiffness in the leather, it’s soft-sided and she finds it easy to turn around. No off-gas odor to hassle with. Color choices are plentiful. What a spectacular design. A light weight stylish pet purse/carrier suitable for replacing your everyday bag if your dog is coming along. If you need to conceal your pet this is the way to go! I believe pet compliance is most successful when you’re using a comfortable product like this to transport them. Hurry, click and purchase. 😁
authors_reviews.author: rescue your pet

authors_reviews.title: We love the bag
authors_reviews.text: The perfect doggy bag. It’s so stylish and my dog loves it.
authors_reviews.author: LUIS SIERRA

other_countries_reviews.author: Jowane

other_countries_reviews.title: It’s solidly okay
other_countries_reviews.text: The bottom is a bit flimsy, started bending after 3 uses and i had to reinforce it. (My cat is 9-10lb).Cat seems comfortable inside, breathable and spacious enough (cat is pretty small)Stitching is a bit clumsy in some places but looks great from a distance. Doesn’t look like a carrier.Handles are sturdy enough (so far). Material is comfortable and doesn’t dig into skin.Zipper seems okay, not the smoothest but seems to be holding fine.
other_countries_reviews.author: Lara

other_countries_reviews.title: Durable and discrete
other_countries_reviews.text: Very discrete, I’ve been using it daily for a few months and it’s stayed in great condition. I like the removable base so that I can clean it out after rainy day adventures
other_countries_reviews.author: Mackenzie filoso
